steps.title: Apply both tree limits
steps.content: The student needs a maple tree that satisfies two criteria: it must be native to North America and it must not grow more than 60 feet tall. Both criteria must be met together.

steps.title: Reject failed criteria
steps.content: A and B fail the height limit, and D fails the native-to-North-America requirement. The selected tree is native to North America and has a maximum height that does not exceed 60 feet. The answer is C.
